title: Jump Game
problem_statement: Given an array of non-negative integers where each index indicates maximum jump length, determine if you can reach the last index.
intuition: Track the farthest reachable index while scanning the array.

approaches.name: Greedy reachability
approaches.description: Iterate through nums, updating the maximum reachable index and checking if the end can be reached.
approaches.why_not: DP with boolean states is correct but slower and uses more memory than greedy.

interview_qa.q: What condition makes the last index unreachable?
interview_qa.a: If current index exceeds the farthest reachable position, you cannot progress further.
Because the only relevant information is the maximum reach from seen positions.
